case_title: ABDEL BENLADGHEM VS. WAI MAN STELLA LAU

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENLADGHEM, ABDEL AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, WAI MAN STELLA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENLADGHEM, ABDEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU, WAI MAN STELLA $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BENLADGHEM, ABDEL AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, WAI MAN STELLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, WAI MAN STELLA

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
